executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped the first concrete consumers of spec 069's HTTP assistant contract: a minimal web chat client and an Android in-app client sharing types generated from the spec 069 golden schema. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-073-A01..A11) cover authenticated turn POST/render, codegen-breaking schema-change detection, idempotent retries, disambig/confirm round-trips, capture-as-fallback parity, prohibition of client-side scenario logic, closed-vocabulary transport_hint usage, web a11y, Android TalkBack a11y, and fail-loud SST for backend base URL.

Created design.md for the web and Android assistant clients, resolving shared generated schema consumption, renderer foundation, idempotent retry, auth storage constraints, fail-loud client config, accessibility, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-073-A01..A11.

Created planning artifacts for SCN-073-A01..A11: four sequential scopes, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and planning-only report.md. Status remains in_progress with planMaturityOnly=true.

Reframed spec 073 from Web/Android to Web/Mobile: iPhone/iOS and Android are both required mobile targets, and mobile delivery must use one shared codebase unless a future owner-approved design amendment documents infeasibility. Substantive design, UX, and plan-owned Android-only content remains routed to owning agents.

Reconciled design.md from a web plus single-platform mobile design to Web/Mobile with one shared iPhone/iOS and Android mobile codebase, generated spec 069 schema models, one response-renderer foundation, adapter-only platform differences, idempotent retry parity, VoiceOver/TalkBack accessibility coverage, and plan-owner routing for stale planning artifacts.

Reconciled plan-owned artifacts from the prior single-platform mobile plan to Web/Mobile: scopes.md, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and report.md now cover web plus one shared iPhone/iOS and Android mobile codebase, generated schema model/renderer canaries, VoiceOver and TalkBack, and idempotent retry parity. Status remains in_progress under product-to-planning/specs_hardened ceiling.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

Resolved SCOPE-2 e2e runner blocker: repo CLI today wires only Go-based e2e (-tags e2e under tests/e2e/...) with no Playwright/browser-driver runner. Reclassified TP-073-09/10/11 from e2e-ui to Go-driven e2e-api driving the embedded PWA HTTP surface plus POST /api/assistant/turn, paired with web/pwa/tests/*.spec.ts documentation stubs following the photos_pwa_test.go pattern. Updated design.md (Brief, Testing Strategy table, Alternatives), scopes.md (SCN-A01/A03/A09 matrix rows, Impact Sweep, Impact-Aware Validation, TP-073-09/10/11), test-plan.json (same three rows reclassified e2e-api with planned Go file paths and rationale notes), and scenario-manifest.json (liveSystemExpectation for A01/A03/A09). Adding a browser-driver runner deferred to a separate foundation spec. SCOPE-3/4 mobile e2e-ui rows unchanged (out of SCOPE-2 boundary).

Resolved bubbles.implement blockers 073-IMPL-BLOCK-1 and 073-IMPL-BLOCK-2. (1) Ratified same-origin HttpOnly session cookie (spec 070 web login flow) as the web auth path for POST /api/assistant/turn; in-memory bearer fallback for web is forbidden. Updated design.md (Brief Open Questions + new Ratified Decisions, Web Client section, Risks/Open Questions table) and scopes.md (Scope 2 SCN-073-A01 Gherkin + implementation plan); scenario-manifest.json SCN-073-A01 gherkin updated to cookie language. (2) Defined the canonical render-descriptor-v1 JSON schema (flat ordered array of typed nodes; closed kind vocabulary text|quote|action|citation) and the shared fixture set at tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/ with seven required cases (text_only, with_sources, disambiguation, confirm_accept_decline, capture_acknowledgement, error_retry, unknown_shape) in design.md § Shared Schema And Renderer Core; updated scopes.md TP-073-03 and test-plan.json TP-073-03 (added fixturePath, fixtureCases, rendererDescriptorSchema fields and resolution note); updated scenario-manifest.json SCN-073-A02 liveSystemExpectation to cite the fixture path and cases. No source/test/config/runtime files modified; status remains in_progress.

SCOPE-073-01 gap-fill: implemented TP-073-03 cross-language renderer canary and re-verified the existing TP-073-07 config fail-loud tests. Created tests/fixtures/assistant_response_v1/render-descriptor-v1.json plus seven input+golden fixture pairs (text_only, with_sources, disambiguation, confirm_accept_decline, capture_acknowledgement, error_retry, unknown_shape). Added the JS renderer at web/pwa/lib/render_descriptor_v1.js + CLI, the Dart shared-core projection at clients/mobile/assistant/lib/core/render_descriptor_v1.dart + tool/render_descriptor_v1_cli.dart (exported from smackerel_assistant). Added tests/unit/clients/render_descriptor_canary_test.go which spawns node and dart on every fixture, validates against the closed render-descriptor-v1 vocabulary, and asserts js==golden, dart==golden, js==dart for all seven scenarios. Evidence: `go test -run TestRenderDescriptorV1_CrossLanguageCanary ./tests/unit/clients/` ok 9.635s; `go test -run 'WebAssistant|MobileAssistant|AssistantFrontend' ./internal/config/` ok 0.022s. Status remains in_progress: SCOPE-073-01 DoD aggregates also cover TP-073-01/02/04/05/06/08 which are NOT addressed by this pass.
